title: Cookie Policy
intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Edmission ("we", "us", "our") uses cookies and similar technologies when you use our website and platform. By using our services, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy.
s1Body: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, to remember your preferences, and to provide information to the owners of the site. We use cookies and similar technologies (such as local storage) to provide, secure, and improve our service.
s2Body: We use cookies to: (a) keep you signed in and remember your session; (b) remember your language and display preferences; (c) remember your cookie consent choice; (d) understand how you use our platform so we can improve it; (e) ensure security and prevent abuse. We do not use cookies to track you across third-party websites for advertising purposes.
s3Body: Strictly necessary cookies: required for the website to function (e.g. authentication, security). Without these, parts of the service would not work. Functional cookies: remember your choices (e.g. language, consent). Analytics cookies: help us understand how visitors use our site (e.g. pages visited, errors). We may use first-party and trusted third-party services for analytics, in line with our Privacy Policy.
s4Body: When you first visit our site, you can accept or reject non-essential cookies via the cookie banner. Your choice is stored (e.g. in local storage) so we do not show the banner again until it is cleared or expired. You can change your browser settings to block or delete cookies; note that blocking strictly necessary cookies may affect how the site works.
s5Body: For details on how we process your personal data, including data collected via cookies, please see our Privacy Policy. If you have questions about this Cookie Policy or our use of cookies, you can contact us through the Support section on the platform or at the contact details provided there.
s6Body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and update the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
